CREATE TABLE grades (id INT, score INT);
SELECT array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT score FROM grades ORDER BY score ASC)) AS grade_indexes FROM grades;
SELECT array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT score FROM grades WHERE score > 15 ORDER BY score DESC)) AS grade_indexes_above_15 FROM grades;
WITH ranked_scores AS (SELECT score, array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT score FROM grades)) AS indexes FROM grades) SELECT indexes FROM ranked_scores WHERE score = 10;
CREATE TABLE extra_grades (id INT, score INT);
SELECT array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT score FROM grades UNION SELECT score FROM extra_grades ORDER BY score)) AS combined_indexes FROM grades;
SELECT g.id, array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT score FROM grades ORDER BY score)) AS grade_indexes FROM grades g WHERE g.score >= (SELECT AVG(score) FROM grades);
SELECT array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT g.score FROM grades g INNER JOIN extra_grades e ON g.id = e.id ORDER BY g.score)) AS joined_indexes FROM grades;
SELECT array_grade_up(ARRAY(SELECT g.score FROM (SELECT score FROM grades UNION SELECT score FROM extra_grades) g)) AS all_indexes FROM grades;
